tools.name: elementor-mcp-list-widgets
tools.description: Returns all registered Elementor widget types with their names, titles, icons, categories, and keywords. Optionally filter by widget category.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-get-widget-schema
tools.description: Returns the full JSON Schema for a widget type's settings, describing all available controls and their types. Use this to discover what settings a widget accepts before creating or updating it.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-get-container-schema
tools.description: Returns JSON Schema for all container controls (flex + grid), including flex_direction, justify_content, align_items, flex_wrap, gap, content_width, min_height, container_type, grid controls, background, border, padding, and more.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-get-page-structure
tools.description: Returns the element tree for an Elementor page, showing all containers, widgets, and their nesting structure. Each element includes its ID, type, widget type (for widgets), and child elements.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-get-element-settings
tools.description: Returns the current settings for a specific element on a page. Provide the post ID and element ID to retrieve all control values for that element.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-find-element
tools.description: Searches elements on a page by type, widget type, or settings content. Returns matching element IDs, types, and a settings preview.

widget_type.description: Filter by widget type (e.g. "heading", "button"). Leave empty for all.

search_text.description: Search for text content in settings values (case-insensitive).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-list-pages
tools.description: Returns all WordPress pages and posts that are built with Elementor. Optionally filter by post type and status.

post_type.description: Filter by post type (e.g. "page", "post"). Default: any.

status.description: Filter by post status (e.g. "publish", "draft"). Default: any.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-list-templates
tools.description: Returns all saved Elementor templates from the template library. Optionally filter by template type (page, section, container).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-get-global-settings
tools.description: Returns the active Elementor kit/global settings including colors, typography, spacing, and breakpoints. These are the site-wide design tokens used across all pages.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-create-page
tools.description: Creates a new WordPress page with Elementor enabled. Optionally provide initial element content.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-update-page-settings
tools.description: Updates page-level Elementor settings such as background, padding, custom CSS, and layout options.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-delete-page-content
tools.description: Clears all Elementor content from a page, resetting it to blank while keeping the page itself.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-import-template
tools.description: Imports a JSON template structure into a page at an optional position.

template_json.description: Elementor JSON element structure to import.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-export-page
tools.description: Exports a page's full Elementor data as a JSON structure that can be imported elsewhere.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-container
tools.description: Adds a container to a page. Supports both flex (default) and grid layouts via container_type. Omit parent_id for top-level, or provide a parent container ID for nesting. Flex tips: Use flex_direction=row for side-by-side children, flex_wrap=wrap for wrapping. Grid tips: Set container_type=grid with grid_columns_grid, grid_rows_grid, grid_gaps. Background: set background_background=classic and background_color=#hex. Border: set border_border=solid, border_width, border_color. Also supports min_height, overflow, html_tag, padding, margin, position, z_index, animation.

parent_id.description: Parent container ID for nesting. Omit for top-level.

settings.description: Container settings: flex_direction, flex_wrap, justify_content, align_items, gap, content_width, padding, margin, background, border, etc.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-update-container
tools.description: Updates settings on an existing container. Settings are merged (partial update). Supports all container controls: flex_direction, justify_content, align_items, flex_wrap, align_content, gap, content_width, min_height, overflow, html_tag, container_type, grid controls, background (set background_background=classic first), border (set border_border=solid first), border_radius, box_shadow, padding, margin, position, z_index, animation, shape dividers, etc.

settings.description: Partial settings to merge into the container.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-update-element
tools.description: Updates settings on any element (container or widget). Settings are merged (partial update). Works for all element types — no need to know if the target is a container or widget.

settings.description: Partial settings to merge into the element.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-batch-update
tools.description: Updates multiple elements in a single save operation. Each operation specifies an element_id and settings to merge. Much more efficient than calling update-element multiple times.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-reorder-elements
tools.description: Reorders the children of a container by providing an ordered array of element IDs. All IDs must be direct children of the specified container.

element_ids.description: Ordered array of child element IDs in the desired order.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-move-element
tools.description: Moves an element to a new parent container and/or position within the page tree.

target_parent_id.description: Target parent container ID. Empty string for top-level.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-remove-element
tools.description: Removes an element and all its children from a page.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-duplicate-element
tools.description: Duplicates an element (including all children) with fresh IDs. The duplicate is placed immediately after the original.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-widget
tools.description: Adds any Elementor widget to a container. Use get-widget-schema to discover the available settings for each widget type.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-update-widget
tools.description: Updates settings on an existing widget. Settings are merged (partial update).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-heading
tools.description: Adds a heading widget. Supports full typography (set typography_typography=custom first), text stroke, text shadow, blend mode, hover color. Also accepts responsive suffixes (align_tablet, align_mobile) and common advanced controls (_margin, _padding, _background_*, _border_*, etc).

typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable typography controls.

typography_font_size.description: Font size: {size, unit}. Units: px, em, rem, vw.

typography_line_height.description: Line height: {size, unit}. Units: px, em.

typography_letter_spacing.description: Letter spacing: {size, unit}. Units: px, em.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-text-editor
tools.description: Adds a rich text editor widget. Supports typography (set typography_typography=custom), drop cap, text columns, and text color. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

drop_cap.description: Enable drop cap on first letter.

column_gap.description: Column gap: {size, unit}. Works with text_columns.

typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable typography controls.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-image
tools.description: Adds an image widget. Supports width, max-width, opacity, border, border-radius, box shadow, CSS filters (brightness, contrast, saturation, hue), and hover effects. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

image.description: Image object with url (required) and optional id.

width.description: Image width: {size, unit}. Units: px, %, vw.

object_fit.description: Object fit when height is set.

hover_animation.description: Hover animation (grow, shrink, pulse, push, etc).

css_filters_css_filter.description: Set to "custom" to enable CSS filter controls.

image_border_width.description: Border width: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

image_border_radius.description: Border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

image_box_shadow_box_shadow.description: Box shadow: {horizontal, vertical, blur, spread, color}.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-button
tools.description: Adds a button widget. Supports typography (set typography_typography=custom), border, background, hover colors, box shadow, and text shadow. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

selected_icon.description: Icon object with value and library.

hover_animation.description: Hover animation (e.g. grow, shrink, pulse, push).

border_width.description: Border width: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

border_radius.description: Border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

button_box_shadow_box_shadow.description: Box shadow: {horizontal, vertical, blur, spread, color}.

typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable typography controls.

button_padding.description: Button padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-video
tools.description: Adds a video widget. Supports YouTube, Vimeo, Dailymotion, self-hosted. Options: start/end time, lazy load, privacy mode, image overlay, play icon. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-icon
tools.description: Adds an icon widget. Supports Font Awesome and SVG icons, view modes (default/stacked/framed), hover colors, rotate, padding, border radius, and hover animation. For SVG, first use upload-svg-icon.

selected_icon.description: Icon object. Font Awesome: { "value": "fas fa-star", "library": "fa-solid" }. SVG: { "value": { "id": 123, "url": "..." }, "library": "svg" }. Libraries: fa-solid, fa-regular, fa-brands.

hover_animation.description: Hover animation (grow, shrink, pulse, push, etc).

border_width.description: Border width for framed view: {size, unit}.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-spacer
tools.description: Adds a spacer widget for vertical spacing between elements.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-divider
tools.description: Adds a horizontal divider/separator widget with style, weight, color, and width options.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-icon-box
tools.description: Adds an icon box widget. Supports icon position (top/left/right), title typography (set title_typography_typography=custom), description typography, icon spacing, hover colors, and hover animation. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

selected_icon.description: Icon object. Font Awesome: { "value": "fas fa-star", "library": "fa-solid" }. SVG: { "value": { "id": 123, "url": "..." }, "library": "svg" }.

icon_space.description: Space between icon and content: {size, unit}.

title_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable title typography.

description_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable description typography.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-accordion
tools.description: Adds an accordion widget. Supports title/content colors, background, border, typography (set title_typography_typography=custom), spacing, icon color, and FAQ schema. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

tabs.description: Array of accordion items with tab_title and tab_content.

selected_icon.description: Icon when collapsed. Default: fas fa-plus.

selected_active_icon.description: Icon when expanded. Default: fas fa-minus.

title_padding.description: Title padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

icon_space.description: Space between icon and title: {size, unit}.

content_padding.description: Content padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

title_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable title typography.

content_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable content typography.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-alert
tools.description: Adds an alert/notice widget with type, title, and description.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-counter
tools.description: Adds an animated counter widget that counts up to a number.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-google-maps
tools.description: Adds an embedded Google Maps widget with address, zoom, and height.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-icon-list
tools.description: Adds a list widget with icons and text. Great for feature lists, checklists, and contact info.

icon_list.description: Array of list items with text, selected_icon, and optional link.

view.description: Layout: traditional (vertical) or inline. Default: traditional.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-image-box
tools.description: Adds an image box widget with image, title, and description. Great for service cards.

image.description: Image object with url and optional id.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-image-carousel
tools.description: Adds a rotating image carousel/slider widget.

carousel.description: Array of image objects with url and optional id.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-progress
tools.description: Adds an animated progress bar widget with label and percentage.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-social-icons
tools.description: Adds social media icon links. Great for headers and footers.

social_icon_list.description: Array of social items with social_icon and link.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-star-rating
tools.description: Adds a star rating display widget.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-tabs
tools.description: Adds a tabbed content widget with horizontal or vertical layout.

tabs.description: Array of tab items with tab_title and tab_content.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-testimonial
tools.description: Adds a testimonial widget with quote, author name, job title, and image.

testimonial_image.description: Author image object with url and optional id.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-toggle
tools.description: Adds a toggle widget (multiple items can be open). Supports title/content colors, background, border, typography (set title_typography_typography=custom), spacing, and icon color. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

tabs.description: Array of toggle items with tab_title and tab_content.

title_padding.description: Title padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

icon_space.description: Space between icon and title: {size, unit}.

content_padding.description: Content padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

title_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable title typography.

content_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable content typography.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-html
tools.description: Adds a custom HTML code widget.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-menu-anchor
tools.description: Adds a menu anchor for one-page navigation.

anchor.description: The anchor ID (used in menu links as #id).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-shortcode
tools.description: Adds a WordPress shortcode widget.

shortcode.description: The shortcode to render, e.g. [contact-form-7 id="123"].

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-rating
tools.description: Adds a star/icon rating widget.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-text-path
tools.description: Adds curved/path text widget.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-form
tools.description: Adds an Elementor Pro form. Supports field types (text, email, textarea, url, tel, select, radio, checkbox, number, date, time, upload, acceptance, password, html, hidden, step), submit button styling, submit actions (email, redirect, webhook, mailchimp, drip, activecampaign, getresponse, convertkit, mailerlite, slack), email settings, redirect, and success/error messages. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

button_width.description: Full-width button. Set to "100" for full width.

email_reply_to.description: Reply-to email (use field shortcode like [field id="email"]).

redirect_to.description: Redirect URL after submit (requires "redirect" in submit_actions).

mark_required.description: Show asterisk on required fields. Default: yes.

button_typography_typography.description: Set to "custom" to enable button typography.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-posts-grid
tools.description: Adds an Elementor Pro posts grid widget to display a grid of posts.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-countdown
tools.description: Adds a countdown timer. Supports due_date or evergreen mode, custom labels, expire actions (hide/redirect/message), and digit/label colors and typography. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

due_date.description: Due date in Y-m-d H:i format.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-price-table
tools.description: Adds a pricing table. Supports 16 currency symbols, sale pricing, ribbon, footer info, button CSS ID, feature icons, and style controls (header/pricing/features/footer/button/ribbon colors and typography). Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

currency_format.description: Price format: comma or dot separator.

original_price.description: Original price (shown crossed out when sale=yes).

features_list.description: Feature list. Each item: {item_text, selected_item_icon, item_icon_color}.

footer_additional_info.description: Footer text below button (e.g. "30-day money back").

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-flip-box
tools.description: Adds a flip box with front/back sides. Supports icon/image graphics, flip effects (flip/slide/push/zoom/fade), height, front/back background colors, title/description colors and typography. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-animated-headline
tools.description: Adds an Elementor Pro animated headline with highlight or rotating text effects.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-call-to-action
tools.description: Adds a call-to-action widget with title, description, button, and optional graphic/ribbon.

link.description: Button link object with url key.

graphic_image.description: Image object with url and optional id.

selected_icon.description: Icon object with value and library.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-slides
tools.description: Adds a full-width slides/slider. Supports heading, description, button per slide, background image/color/overlay, Ken Burns, content animation, height, navigation, autoplay, colors, typography. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

slides_padding.description: Content padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-testimonial-carousel
tools.description: Adds a testimonial carousel. Supports skins (default/bubble), layouts, navigation (arrows/dots), slide spacing, background/text/border colors, image size, content gap, and name/title/content typography. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

slides.description: Array of testimonial items with content, image, name, and title.

slide_padding.description: Slide padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

slide_border_radius.description: Slide border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

image_gap.description: Gap between image and text: {size, unit}.

image_border_radius.description: Image border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-price-list
tools.description: Adds a price list widget for menus, services, or product lists with title, price, and description.

price_list.description: Array of list items with title, price, item_description, image, and link.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-gallery
tools.description: Adds an advanced gallery. Supports grid/justified/masonry layouts, multiple galleries with filtering, aspect ratio, overlay effects, lightbox, lazy load, image border/radius, and hover opacity/CSS filters. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

gallery.description: Array of image objects with id and url.

columns.description: Number of columns. Default: 4. Responsive: columns_tablet, columns_mobile.

gallery_type.description: Single or multiple galleries (with filter bar).

galleries.description: For gallery_type=multiple: array of {gallery_title, gallery (array of images)}.

ideal_row_height.description: Ideal row height for justified layout: {size, unit}.

image_border_radius.description: Image border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

image_border_width.description: Image border width: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-share-buttons
tools.description: Adds social share buttons for sharing the current page.

share_buttons.description: Array of share buttons with button (network name) and optional text.

button.description: Network: facebook, twitter, linkedin, pinterest, reddit, etc.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-table-of-contents
tools.description: Adds an auto-generated table of contents widget based on page headings.

title.description: TOC title. Default: Table of Contents.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-blockquote
tools.description: Adds a styled blockquote widget with quote text, author, tweet button, colors, border, typography. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

url_type.description: URL to share: current page or custom.

content_gap.description: Gap between quote and author: {size, unit}.

border_color.description: Border color (border skin) or quotation mark color (quotation skin).

border_gap.description: Gap between border and content: {size, unit}.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-lottie
tools.description: Adds a Lottie animation widget. Supports triggers, loop, speed, renderer, sizing, link, viewport settings, opacity, CSS filters. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-hotspot
tools.description: Adds an image hotspot widget with clickable/hoverable points. Supports tooltip settings, animations, hotspot sizing/colors, image width. Accepts responsive suffixes and advanced controls.

image.description: Background image object with url and optional id.

image_border_radius.description: Image border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

hotspot_padding.description: Hotspot padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

hotspot_border_radius.description: Hotspot border radius: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

hotspot_box_shadow_box_shadow_type.description: Set to "yes" for hotspot box shadow.

hotspot_box_shadow_box_shadow.description: Hotspot box shadow: {horizontal, vertical, blur, spread, color}.

tooltip_padding.description: Tooltip padding: {top, right, bottom, left, unit, isLinked}.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-nav-menu
tools.description: Adds a WordPress navigation menu widget (Pro).

menu_name.description: Menu name (as registered in WP Menus).

dropdown.description: Breakpoint for dropdown toggle. Default: tablet.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-loop-grid
tools.description: Adds a loop grid widget that displays posts/pages/CPTs using a loop template (Pro).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-loop-carousel
tools.description: Adds a loop carousel widget that displays posts in a carousel using a loop template (Pro).

slides_to_scroll.description: Slides to scroll per step. Default: 1.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-media-carousel
tools.description: Adds a media carousel widget for images/video with multiple skins (Pro).

slides.description: Array of slide items with image/video.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-nested-tabs
tools.description: Adds a modern nested tabs widget where each tab content is a container (Pro). Tab content can be populated by adding child elements to the tab containers after creation.

tabs_direction.description: Tab direction. block-start=top, block-end=bottom, inline-start=left, inline-end=right.

horizontal_scroll.description: Enable horizontal scroll for tabs. Default: disable.

breakpoint_selector.description: Breakpoint for accordion mode. Default: mobile.

tabs_title_typography_typography.description: Set to "yes" for custom tab typography.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-nested-accordion
tools.description: Adds a modern nested accordion widget where each item content is a container (Pro). Item content can be populated by adding child elements to the item containers after creation.

default_state.description: Default state. Default: expanded (first item open).

max_items_expended.description: Max items expanded at once. Default: one.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-portfolio
tools.description: Adds an Elementor Pro portfolio widget to display a filterable grid of posts or custom post types.

posts_per_page.description: Number of posts to display. Default: 6.

show_filter_bar.description: Show category filter bar. Default: no.

show_title.description: Show post title overlay. Default: yes.

title_tag.description: HTML tag for the title. Default: h3.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-author-box
tools.description: Adds an Elementor Pro author box widget displaying the post author's avatar, name, bio, and a link to their posts.

author_name_tag.description: HTML tag for the author name. Default: h3.

show_link.description: Show link button to author posts. Default: yes.

link_text.description: Button label for the author posts link. Default: More Posts.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-login
tools.description: Adds an Elementor Pro login form widget with configurable fields, labels, remember me, lost password link, and post-login redirect.

button_text.description: Submit button label. Default: Log In.

redirect_after_login.description: Enable custom redirect after login. Default: no.

redirect_url.description: URL to redirect to after login (requires redirect_after_login=yes).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-code-highlight
tools.description: Adds a syntax-highlighted code block widget.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-reviews
tools.description: Adds a reviews/testimonials carousel widget.

slides_per_view.description: Number of slides visible at once. Default: 3.

pause_on_hover.description: Pause autoplay on hover. Default: yes.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-off-canvas
tools.description: Adds an off-canvas panel widget.

prevent_scroll.description: Lock body scroll when open. Default: yes.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-progress-tracker
tools.description: Adds a scroll progress tracker widget.

circular_size.description: Circle diameter in pixels (circular type). Default: 200.

circular_width.description: Circle stroke width in pixels (circular type). Default: 8.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-search
tools.description: Adds a search widget with live results support.

search_input_placeholder_text.description: Placeholder text for the search input. Default: Search...

live_results.description: Enable live search results dropdown. Default: no.

search_query_post_type.description: Post type to search. Default: any.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-wc-products
tools.description: Adds a WooCommerce products grid widget (Pro + WooCommerce).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-wc-add-to-cart
tools.description: Adds a WooCommerce add-to-cart button widget (Pro + WooCommerce).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-wc-cart
tools.description: Adds the WooCommerce cart page widget (Pro + WooCommerce).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-wc-checkout
tools.description: Adds the WooCommerce checkout page widget (Pro + WooCommerce).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-wc-menu-cart
tools.description: Adds a mini cart icon for the menu (Pro + WooCommerce).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-save-as-template
tools.description: Saves a page or a specific element as a reusable Elementor template.

element_id.description: Specific element ID to save. Omit to save the entire page.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-apply-template
tools.description: Applies a saved Elementor template to a page at a given position, inserting its elements with fresh IDs.

template_id.description: The template post ID to apply.

parent_id.description: Parent container ID. Empty for top-level.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-create-theme-template
tools.description: Creates a new Elementor Pro theme builder template (header, footer, single, archive, 404, etc.).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-set-template-conditions
tools.description: Sets display conditions for a theme builder template (e.g., Entire Site, specific pages, post types).

conditions.description: Array of condition rules. Each is an array like ["include", "general"] for Entire Site, or ["include", "singular", "post"] for all posts.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-list-dynamic-tags
tools.description: Lists all available Elementor Pro dynamic tags with their names, groups, and categories.

group.description: Filter by tag group (e.g., "post", "site", "author", "media", "action", "woocommerce"). Omit for all.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-set-dynamic-tag
tools.description: Sets a dynamic tag on a specific setting of an element. This makes the setting value dynamic (e.g., title becomes post title).

setting_key.description: The setting key to make dynamic (e.g., "title", "url", "image").

tag_settings.description: Optional settings for the dynamic tag.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-create-popup
tools.description: Creates a new Elementor Pro popup template.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-set-popup-settings
tools.description: Configures popup triggers, timing, and display conditions for an Elementor Pro popup.

triggers.description: Trigger settings: { "on_page_load": {"enabled": true, "delay": 3}, "on_scroll": {"enabled": true, "direction": "down", "offset": 50}, "on_click": {"enabled": true, "times": 1}, "on_exit_intent": {"enabled": true}, "on_inactivity": {"enabled": true, "time": 30} }.

conditions.description: Display conditions, same format as set-template-conditions.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-update-global-colors
tools.description: Updates the site-wide color palette in the Elementor kit. Provide an array of color objects with id, title, and color (hex).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-update-global-typography
tools.description: Updates the site-wide typography settings in the Elementor kit.

typography_font_size.description: Font size with size and unit.

typography_line_height.description: Line height with size and unit.

typography_letter_spacing.description: Letter spacing with size and unit.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-build-page
tools.description: Creates a complete Elementor page from a declarative structure in a single call. Supports nested containers and any widget types. IMPORTANT LAYOUT RULES: (1) For side-by-side columns, use a parent container with flex_direction=row — children are auto-set to content_width=full with equal percentage widths (e.g. 2 children = 50%, 3 = 33.33%). (2) NEVER set flex_wrap or _flex_size in settings — these cause layout overflow. The tool handles layout automatically. (3) Background colors: set background_background=classic and background_color=#hex on containers. (4) Background images: set background_background=classic, background_image={url,id}, background_size=cover. (5) Background overlay: background_overlay_background=classic, background_overlay_color=#hex, background_overlay_opacity={size:0.7,unit:px}. (6) Text alignment: text_align on text/heading widgets. (7) Use search-images and sideload-image tools to get real images before building.

structure.description: Declarative element tree. Each item has type (container|widget), settings, and optionally children (for containers) or widget_type (for widgets).

tools.name: elementor-mcp-search-images
tools.description: Searches Openverse (WordPress.org) for Creative Commons licensed images. Returns image URLs, thumbnails, licensing info, and attribution. Use the returned URLs with sideload-image or add-stock-image.

license.description: Filter by Creative Commons license type.

aspect_ratio.description: Filter by aspect ratio. Use "wide" for landscape images (recommended for hero banners, cards, and most page layouts). Use "tall" for portrait/sidebar images. Use "square" for avatars and thumbnails.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-sideload-image
tools.description: Downloads an external image URL into the WordPress Media Library and returns the local attachment ID and URL. Use this after search-images to import a chosen image.

url.description: The external image URL to download.

title.description: Attachment title. Falls back to the filename.

attribution.description: Attribution text for Creative Commons images. Stored as the attachment caption/excerpt.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-stock-image
tools.description: Searches Openverse for an image, downloads it to the Media Library, and adds it as an image widget to the page — all in one step. Defaults to landscape (wide) images for consistent layouts. Combines search-images + sideload-image + add-image.

query.description: Image search keywords (e.g. "hero banner technology", "team photo office").

index.description: Which search result to use (0 = best match). Default: 0.

caption.description: Caption override. Defaults to Openverse attribution.

aspect_ratio.description: Image aspect ratio filter. Default: wide (landscape). Use "wide" for hero banners and card images, "tall" for sidebar/portrait, "square" for thumbnails, "any" for no filter.

alt_text.description: Alt text override. Defaults to the image title.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-upload-svg-icon
tools.description: Uploads an SVG icon to the WordPress Media Library and returns an Elementor icon object ready to use with any widget that accepts icons (icon, icon-box, button, etc.). Accepts either an external SVG URL or raw SVG markup. The returned icon object has the format: { "value": { "id": 123, "url": "..." }, "library": "svg" }. Use this value for the selected_icon setting in icon/icon-box widgets, or the selected_icon setting in button widgets.

svg_url.description: External URL to an SVG file to download and import. Use this OR svg_content, not both.

svg_content.description: Raw SVG markup string (e.g. "<svg viewBox='0 0 24 24'><path d='M12 ...'/></svg>"). Use this OR svg_url, not both.

title.description: Title for the SVG in the Media Library. Falls back to filename or "Custom SVG Icon".

icon_object.description: Ready-to-use Elementor icon object. Pass this directly as the selected_icon setting.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-custom-js
tools.description: Adds a custom JavaScript snippet to a page by inserting an HTML widget containing a <script> tag. Works with free Elementor (no Pro required). The JS code is automatically wrapped in <script> tags — do NOT include them yourself. Use wrap_dom_ready=true to wrap in a DOMContentLoaded listener. For site-wide JS, use add-code-snippet instead (requires Pro).

js.description: JavaScript code to inject. Do NOT include <script> tags — they are added automatically.

wrap_dom_ready.description: Wrap the code in a DOMContentLoaded listener. Default: false.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-custom-css
tools.description: Adds custom CSS to a specific element or to the entire page. Requires Elementor Pro. For element-level CSS, use the keyword "selector" as a placeholder for the element's CSS wrapper (e.g. "selector .heading { color: red; }" or "selector:hover { transform: scale(1.05); }"). For page-level CSS, omit element_id. Appends to existing CSS by default; set replace=true to overwrite.

element_id.description: Optional element ID to apply CSS to. If omitted, CSS is applied at the page level.

css.description: CSS rules to add. Use "selector" as the element wrapper placeholder for element-level CSS.

replace.description: If true, replaces existing custom CSS instead of appending. Default: false.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-add-code-snippet
tools.description: Creates a site-wide Custom Code snippet using Elementor Pro. Injects CSS or JavaScript into the <head>, after <body> open, or before </body> close on ALL pages. Use this for analytics scripts, site-wide CSS overrides, meta tags, or tracking pixels. Requires Elementor Pro and manage_options capability.

title.description: Descriptive title for the snippet (e.g. "Google Analytics", "Global CSS overrides").

code.description: The full code to inject. Include <script>, <style>, or <meta> tags as needed.

location.description: Where to inject: "head" = <head> tag, "body_start" = after <body>, "body_end" = before </body>. Default: head.

priority.description: Load order priority (1-10, lower = earlier). Default: 1.

status.description: Post status. "publish" = active immediately. "draft" = saved but not active. Default: publish.

ensure_jquery.description: If true, ensures jQuery is loaded before this snippet runs. Default: false.

tools.name: elementor-mcp-list-code-snippets
tools.description: Lists all existing Elementor Pro Custom Code snippets with their titles, locations, priorities, and statuses. Requires Elementor Pro.

status.description: Filter by post status. Default: any.
